sentences.text: If the Zama16b extension is implemented, then the in main memory regions with both the cacheability and coherence PMAs is 16 bytes.
sentences.section: Preamble > Zama16b Extension for 16-byte Misaligned Atomicity, Version 1.0

sentences.text: Misaligned loads, stores, and AMOs to main memory regions that do not cross a naturally aligned 16-byte boundary are atomic.
sentences.section: Preamble > Zama16b Extension for 16-byte Misaligned Atomicity, Version 1.0
